title: Phone Login - Verify validation for empty phone number field
description: Tests that the system prevents login and shows an error if the phone number field is empty.
preconditions: User is on the Login screen.

steps.description: 1. Do not enter any text in the phone number input field.
3. Observe the screen for an error message.

expected_result: An appropriate error message (e.g., 'Phone number cannot be empty') is displayed, and the user remains on the Login screen.
